description: You are a molecular biologist designing a fluorescent fusion protein to track autophagy in live cells. Using the sequences in ~/UGENE_Data/fusion_design/pEGFP-C1.gb and ~/UGENE_Data/fusion_design/MAP1LC3B.gb, construct an in-frame fusion sequence by concatenating the EGFP CDS (with its stop codon removed) followed by the full MAP1LC3B CDS. Save the resulting fusion nucleotide sequence to ~/UGENE_Data/fusion_design/results/egfp_lc3b_fusion.fasta and its translated protein sequence to ~/UGENE_Data/fusion_design/results/egfp_lc3b_protein.fasta. Generate a summary report at ~/UGENE_Data/fusion_design/results/fusion_report.txt containing the original EGFP CDS length (bp), original MAP1LC3B CDS length (bp), final fusion nucleotide sequence length (bp), final fusion protein length (aa), and a statement confirming the absence of internal stop codons.
